checks.name: record_count_present
checks.description: Stage153 must inspect the Stage151 local memory records.

checks.name: required_fields_present
checks.description: All memory records must retain the Stage150 base fields.

checks.name: checksum_integrity_pass
checks.description: All memory records must match deterministic checksums.

checks.name: duplicate_record_ids_absent
checks.description: Memory record identifiers must remain unique.

checks.name: write_policy_disabled
checks.description: Every memory record must keep writes disabled by default.

checks.name: hidden_payload_absent
checks.description: Store rows cannot contain hidden/private/write/raw payload columns.
